---
description: Project-local Markdown memory rules
applyTo: "**"
---

# Markdown memory

Use `docs/pegasus/memory/` as the project continuity layer.

At session start or after context compaction, read `context.md`, `decisions.md`, `tasks-log.md`, `handoff.md`, and `learnings.md`.

When work changes facts, decisions, tasks, blockers, or learnings, update the matching memory file immediately. Before ending a session, write a concise handoff.
